snippets.title: Factory continue
snippets.body: Keep the factory loop going. Pick the next unblocked ticket, implement it, verify it, and continue without stopping for handoff unless human action is required.

snippets.title: Review stack
snippets.body: Review the current PR/MR stack from bottom to top. Surface blocking findings first, then fix deterministic issues and rerun verification.

snippets.title: Unblock ticket
snippets.body: Re-check the blocked ticket. If the blocker is gone, update its status and continue implementation. If still blocked, state the exact unresolved condition.

snippets.title: Backlog triage
snippets.body: Scan the backlog and choose the next highest-leverage unblocked ticket. Explain the choice briefly, then start work.
